en: I don't know what your love has done to me Think I'm invincible, I see
ko: 네 사랑이 나한테 무슨 짓을 한 건지 모르겠어

en: Through the me I used to be You changed my whole life
Don't know what you're doing to me With your love
I'm feeling all superhuman You did this to me
Superhuman heart beats in me Nothing can stop me here with you
ko: 너와 함께라면 아무것도 날 막을 수 없어

en: Strong, since I've been flying and righting the wrongs Feels almost like I had it all along
